Our Story

Beauty is an Art.
We are the Artists.

Nestled in Santaji Chowk, Perfect Beauty Parlour has established itself as the most trusted destination for premium beauty treatments. Founded by Nishigandha Mane, our parlour blends traditional beauty wisdom with cutting-edge modern techniques.

Whether it's your special wedding day or a refreshing weekend treatment — every visit is a ritual designed just for you.

💄
Expert Beauticians
Trained professionals bringing out your best
✨
Premium Products
Only certified, high-quality brands
👰
Bridal Specialist
Your dream wedding look, perfected
🌿
Hygiene First
Strict cleanliness every visit
What We Offer

Our Signature Services

Tap any card to book that service directly on WhatsApp.

01 / SERVICE
🦋

Eyebrow Shaping

Precision eyebrow threading, shaping and tinting designed to frame your face beautifully.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
02 / SERVICE
🌸

Waxing

Full body and partial waxing using premium wax for smooth, long-lasting results with minimal discomfort.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
03 / SERVICE
✂️

Advanced Hair Cut

Precision cuts tailored to your face shape — from trendy layers to timeless classics.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
04 / SERVICE
💎

BluTox

Advanced Bluetox treatment that deeply nourishes, reconstructs and adds mirror-like shine to damaged hair.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
05 / SERVICE
🌿

Vegan Treatments

100% plant-based, cruelty-free hair and skin treatments for the conscious beauty lover.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
06 / SERVICE
🌊

Hair Smoothing

Professional smoothing and straightening for frizz-free, silky, manageable hair — lasting months.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
07 / SERVICE
⚗️

NanoTox

Next-generation NanoTox that restores hair strength at a molecular level — the future of hair care.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
08 / SERVICE
🎨

Hair Colour

Global colouring, root touch-ups and fashion shades with premium brands for vibrant, lasting results.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →

🌟

Highlights

Balayage, ombre and classic highlights that add dimension and luminosity to your hair.

💬 Book on WhatsApp →
10 / SERVICE
✨

Hydra Facial

Our Promise

Why Choose Perfect Beauty

🏆
Expert Professionals

Our beauticians are trained in the latest techniques and continuously upskill to deliver world-class results.

🌿
Hygiene Certified

Hospital-grade cleanliness. Every tool is sterilized, every surface sanitized before your visit.

✨
Premium Products

Only certified, dermatologist-approved brands — no compromise on what touches your skin and hair.

💕
Personalized Care

Every treatment is customized to your unique needs, skin type, and beauty goals.
